title: Codex Continuity Follow-Up Hardening
problem: Continuity routing fixes need release, topology, test, UI, diagnostics, and official-OpenAI hardening before they are operator-safe.
gates: cargo nextest run -p codex-helper-core continuity_domain route_affinity capabilities --no-fail-fast
cargo nextest run -p codex-helper-core response_semantics remote_compaction_v2 responses_websocket --no-fail-fast
cargo nextest run -p codex-helper-core persisted_crud runtime_overrides --no-fail-fast
cargo nextest run -p codex-helper-core codex_capability_profile capabilities continuity_domain --no-fail-fast

continue_policy.notes: Continue through the six requested follow-ups. Split only if desktop publication, official credential identity, or unrelated route graph scoring grows beyond this lane.
